prompt: I want to create an optimization loop for my email subject line generator. It uses OpenAI's API to generate subject lines and I want to evaluate them on click-worthiness, clarity, and length. Can you set everything up from scratch?
assertions: Creates a new config YAML with openai_text as the generation backend
Defines evaluation criteria matching the user's three requirements: click-worthiness, clarity, and length
Includes realistic email subject line topics as test inputs
Creates an initial prompt.txt as a starting point for optimization
Sets up or documents the data directory structure needed for the optimization loop
